items.caption: A stained glass window with a cosmic theme. the central motif is a stylized representation of the dark side of the moon, a famous album cover by pink floyd. the window is divided into sections, each with a different phrase or title related to the album's themes. the phrases include "eclipse," "speak to me," "breathe," "on the run," "time," and "money." below the central image, there is a silhouette of a group of people, possibly representing the band members, standing in front of a swirling, abstract design that could be interpreted as a representation of the album's title, "the great gig in the sky." the overall style of the window is reminiscent of the psychedelic art associated with the album's cover.
